channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Top moments from the 2026 NBA draft
item.description: The first round of the 2026 NBA draft ended with AJ Dybantsa as the No. 1 pick for the Washington Wizards.

item.title: WATCH: Crash test comparison shows safety improvements in cars
item.description: The Insurance Institute for Highway Safety released a crash test video comparing a 2026 model with older vehicles to highlight safety advances.

item.title: What's driving Latino voters? 'The economy, and the economy, and the economy.'
item.description: Latino political strategists analyze races where Latino voters could be decisive in the midterms, citing the economy as the top issue.

item.title: Trump-linked firm lobbies for pardons; first client paid $500K
item.description: Mo Strategies, founded by former Trump campaign and administration officials, has entered the pardon lobbying business with an initial client paying $500,000.
